title: Horse Blindness
description: Realistic simulation of a disease that makes you unable to see horses
body:
Horse blindness is a disease that makes seeing or conceptualizing a horse challenging or, in most cases, completely impossible. It affects thousands of people around the globe. 

This resourcepack was made in an attempt to spread awareness about this illness. You can now see for yourself what it's like to live with this condition.
